## 📋 Pull Request Summary

<!-- Provide a brief description of your changes -->

**Type of Change:**
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI change
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional changes)
- [ ] 🔒 Security fix

---

## 🔗 Related Issues

Closes #<!-- issue number -->

## 🧪 How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual browser testing (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] Mobile responsive testing

- Node.js version:
- Browser(s) tested:

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I've performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I've commented complex/non-obvious code
- [ ] I've updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes don't introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I've added/updated tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] I've checked for potential security issues
- [ ] I've verified no `.env` files or secrets are committed
